title: Release Gate
prompt: A release has passing tests, rollback prepared, and docs updated, but one open P1 bug remains. What should happen? Submit JSON: {"optionIds":["A"]}.

options.text: Block the release until the P1 bug is resolved or formally waived by the release owner.
Release immediately because the rollback plan exists.
Release quietly and fix the P1 bug later.
Hide the P1 bug from the release notes.
